lists.3: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

DTCFormatIdentifier.comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

lists.0: Electrical system S / ABS control - Initial state (control application inactive)(00h)
lists.2: Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 2(02h)
lists.3: Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 3(03h)
lists.4: Electrically controlled S / ABS control - Normal control 4(04h)
lists.9: Electrically controlled S / ABS control -CAN input signal abnormality detection(09h)

lists.0: (TBD)S/ABS control - initial state (there is no ESA control application operation demand)(00h)
lists.1: (TBD)S/ABS control - ESA control application operation demand(01h)

lists.2: EVC Not available as an actuator

lists.0: No warning Vehicle not immobilized display request(00h)
lists.1: Warning Vehicle not immobilized display request(01h)

lists.8: VMC Left revolution operation display On
lists.9: VMC Right revolution operation display On

lists.1264: OutputControl.SSA active test 1 (SSA lamp driving force execution state
lists.1265: OutputControl.SSA active test 2 (SSA switch lamp execution state

lists.0: REAR SUSPENSION WITH MULTI-LAYER ENERGY ABSORBER(00h)

lists.2: BLIND SPOT WARNING + CROSS TRAFIC ALERT(02h)
lists.4: BLIND SPOT INTEREVNTION + CROSS TRAFFIC ALERT(04h)
lists.6: BLIND SPOT WARNING + BACKUP COLLISION INTERVENTION + RR AEB(PEDESTRIAN)(06h)
lists.7: BLIND SPOT INTERVENTION + BACKUP COLLISION INTERVENTION + RR AEB(PEDESTRIAN)(07h)

lists.3: FR + RR SENSORS + IPA + PSM + FKP(03h)

lists.2: FORWARD EMERGENCY BRAKING   (CITY + INTER URBAN) + PEDESTRIAN(02h)
lists.4: FORWARD EMERGENCY BRAKING + JUNCTION ASSIST  + HEAD ON(04h)

lists.0: NO EMERGENCY ASSIST FOR PEDAL MISAPPLICATION(00h)
lists.1: WITH EMERGENCY ASSIST FOR PEDAL MISAPPLICATION(01h)

lists.0: Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC

lists.1: exact torque request can not be achieved (measure imprecision)
lists.2: transcient state preventing torque request realization
lists.3: torque request can not be achieved

lists.5: CC ON and ( awaiting  or suspended)

lists.8: VMC Left revolution operation display On
lists.9: VMC Right revolution operation display On

lists.1264: OutputControl.SSA active test 1 (SSA lamp driving force execution state
lists.1265: OutputControl.SSA active test 2 (SSA switch lamp execution state
